name: Yapi Kredi Koray Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
summary: Yapi Kredi Koray Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S., a real estate investment trust (REIT), engages in the purchase, sale, and rental of real estate properties in Turkey. The company's investment portfolio of properties consists of residential and commercial real estate. It also involves in the project development. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
